name: /zipfiles
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for source files/folders
Step 2: Ask for destination ZIP file
Step 3: Ask for exclude patterns
Step 4: Create ZIP with selected files
Step 5: Return ZIP file path

name: /unzipfiles
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for ZIP file location
Step 2: Ask for extraction destination
Step 3: Ask for safe extraction options
Step 4: Ask for flatten directory structure
Step 5: Extract files and return paths

name: /skill-quick
long_description:
Step 1: Show available templates
Step 2: Ask user to select template
Step 3: Ask for skill name and basic details
Step 4: Generate skill from template
Step 5: Return skill files

name: /skill-list
long_description:
Step 1: Scan skills directory
Step 2: Read each skill.yaml
Step 3: Display skill list with status
Step 4: Show command count per skill
Step 5: Provide filter options

name: /skill-edit
long_description:
Step 1: List available skills
Step 2: Ask which skill to edit
Step 3: Load skill.yaml and SKILL.md
Step 4: Present editable fields
Step 5: Save changes and validate

name: /skill-export
long_description:
Step 1: Ask which skill to export
Step 2: Validate skill structure
Step 3: Create ZIP package
Step 4: Include all skill files
Step 5: Return download path

name: /skill-test
long_description:
Step 1: Ask which skill to test
Step 2: Validate skill structure
Step 3: Run skill in test mode
Step 4: Show test results
Step 5: Provide debugging info

name: /herosection
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for product/offer details
Step 2: Generate pre-headline hook
Step 3: Create main headline
Step 4: Write post-headline support
Step 5: Provide CTA button copy

name: /salespage
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for product details
Step 2: Generate 2500+ word page
Step 3: Include all sections (headline, story, problem, solution, features, proof, offer, guarantee, close)
Step 4: Format with HTML
Step 5: Return complete page

name: /email conversion
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for sequence type (welcome, sales, nurture)
Step 2: Ask for number of emails
Step 3: Generate subject lines
Step 4: Write email bodies
Step 5: Provide preview text

name: /memory bank
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for action (store/retrieve/update)
Step 2: If storing, collect information
Step 3: If retrieving, search memory
Step 4: If updating, find and modify
Step 5: Confirm operation

name: /sales page
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for order form preference
Step 2: Ask for one-step or two-step
Step 3: Get product details
Step 4: Generate sales page
Step 5: Create product and link

name: /aeo-optimizer
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for content to optimize
Step 2: Analyze for ChatGPT/Perplexity visibility
Step 3: Add entity-rich writing
Step 4: Insert schema markup
Step 5: Format for citations

name: /competitive-analyzer
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for competitor name/URL

Step 3: Analyze strengths/weaknesses
Step 4: Identify market gaps
Step 5: Provide differentiation strategy

name: /data-analyst
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for data source
Step 2: Load and clean data
Step 3: Perform statistical analysis
Step 4: Create visualizations
Step 5: Extract insights

name: /lead-magnet-creator
long_description:
Step 1: Ask for lead magnet type
Step 2: Get topic and audience details
Step 3: Generate content outline
Step 4: Create full content
Step 5: Format for delivery

long_description:
Step 1: Ask for PDF file

Step 4: Return extracted data
Step 5: Save output files

name: /sales-funnel-copywriter

name: /seo-content-writer

Step 3: Create content brief

name: /spreadsheet-automator
